decoration: minimal — one or two subtle shapes
hero_layout: centered — everything stacked in the middle
hero_headline_scale: large — noticeably big, makes a statement
hero_height: full viewport — 100vh with scroll cue below
nav_style: hamburger menu icon only (even on desktop)
scroll_animation: moderate — staggered entrance of cards and elements
hover_effects: subtle — slight lift or color shift on cards
quirk: project cards flip on hover to reveal description on the back
